_comment: DCSS unrandart data from art-data.txt (0.32). 143 unique items.

items.name: Wrath of Trog
items.desc: It causes slowness and exhaustion when equipped.

items.name: partisan of Prune
items.desc: Prune:     It halves damage taken while paralysed, petrified or unconscious.

items.name: staff of Olgreb
items.desc: Radiate: It can be activated via the 'a'bility menu to radiate toxic energy, with effectiveness depending on Evocations skill.

items.name: crystal ball of Wucad Mu
items.desc: Mindtap:  Whenever a successful spell causes magic to be channelled         from it, it may also drain additional magic from other enemies in         sight, with a chance increasing with spell level.

items.name: orb of Dispater
items.desc: +Damnation: It grants the ability to hurl damnation at the cost of health and magic, with strength depending on Evocations skill.

items.name: sceptre of Asmodeus
items.desc: Hellfire Court: It may summon demons of flame and damnation when striking foes.

items.name: eveningstar "Brilliance"
items.desc: Umbra:     It surrounds you with an aura of shadow, increasing your stealth and reducing the accuracy of all others within it.

items.name: zealot's sword
items.desc: Zealotry:  Whenever the wielder enters a berserk rage, their allies are berserked alongside them.

items.name: morningstar "Eos"
items.desc: Halo:      It grants its wielder a halo, revealing invisible creatures and increasing accuracy against all within it other than the wielder.

items.name: heavy crossbow "Sniper"
items.desc: Acc+∞:     It never misses its target.

items.name: Spriggan's Knife
items.desc: Stab:      It is more effective when stabbing unaware enemies, sometimes treating them as though they were completely helpless.

items.name: cloak of the Thief
items.desc: Quiet:      All noise in your surroundings is dampened.

items.name: hood of the Assassin
items.desc: Detect:    It allows the wearer to sense nearby creatures.

items.name: skin of Zhor
items.desc: *Englaciate: It radiates cold, occasionally slowing all nearby creatures who are not resistant to cold.

items.name: salamander hide armour
items.desc: Flames:    It surrounds you with flame clouds.

items.name: robe of Folly
items.desc: Brill:     It increases the power of your magical spells and halves their MP cost (rounding up).

items.name: mask of the Dragon
items.desc: Dragonpray: It occasionally summons a dragon when using Invocations with hostile monsters in sight. Chance is 10% + twice the piety cost of the ability used.

items.name: robe of Night
items.desc: Dark:      It shrouds the wearer in darkness, reducing the range at which they can see and be seen by others.

items.name: fencer's gloves
items.desc: Riposte:   It allows the wearer to riposte with melee weapons, swiftly retaliating against missed or blocked melee attacks.

items.name: cloak of Starlight
items.desc: *Dazzle:   It may blind adjacent enemies who miss an attack against the wearer in melee combat.

items.name: ratskin cloak
items.desc: *Rats:     When the wearer is hurt, rats may emerge from it to assist them.

items.name: shield of the Gong
items.desc: Loud:      It is deafeningly noisy when blocking attacks.

items.name: amulet of the Air
items.desc: Inacc:     It reduces the accuracy of your attacks and spells.

items.name: ring of Shadows
items.desc: Umbra:     It surrounds you with an aura of shadow, increasing your stealth and reducing the accuracy of all others within it.

items.name: necklace of Bloodlust
items.desc: Fury:      It extends the wearer's berserk rage when killing foes.

items.name: robe of Clouds
items.desc: *Thunder:  It occasionally creates storm clouds above nearby enemies.

items.name: obsidian axe
items.desc: Mesm:      Its wielder is mesmerised by any visible foes, and it cannot be unequipped while any foes are visible.

items.name: lightning scales
items.desc: Swift:     It allows the wearer to cover ground more swiftly.

items.name: dragonskin cloak
items.desc: Avatar's Aegis: It grants the wearer a chance to resist fire, cold, poison, electricity, acid, and negative energy.

items.name: macabre finger necklace
items.desc: Ring+:   It enables you to equip an extra ring.

items.name: great mace "Firestarter"
items.desc: rFlCloud:  It grants immunity to clouds of flame.

items.name: robe of Vines
items.desc: NoPotionHeal: Its wearer cannot be healed by potions.

items.name: Kryia's mail coat
items.desc: PotionHeal*2: Potions heal its wearer twice as much.

items.name: sphere of Battle
items.desc: Battle: It summons a battlesphere in combat, with strength depending on Conjurations skill.

items.name: Cigotuvi's embrace
items.desc: Corpsefed: It gathers nearby corpses to temporarily increase the armour it provides.

items.name: seven-league boots
items.desc: Rampage+∞: When moving toward enemies, its wearer moves as far as possible, alerting their target en route.

items.name: Mad Mage's Maulers
items.desc: Infuse+∞:  It empowers its wearer's blows with all of their magic.

items.name: dreamshard necklace
items.desc: *Dream:    It absorbs a single lethal wound into itself, holding its wearer just short of death and releasing dream-creatures to guard them.

items.name: Delatra's gloves
items.desc: ID++:      It heals its wearer when they drink unknown potions, and restores their MP when they read unknown scrolls.

items.name: Lochaber axe
items.desc: Poleaxe:   It uses either Axes or Polearms skill, whichever is higher.

items.name: consecrated labrys
items.desc: Valiant:   It becomes more powerful as more dangerous foes come into view.

items.name: toga "Victory"
items.desc: *Victory:  When the wearer kills a threatening monster, it has a chance to gain +1 AC, +1 Slay, and +1 Int, capping at +7. When the wearer uses a scroll or a potion with a hostile monster in sight, its bonuses reset to +0. Unequipping it also resets its bonuses to +0.

items.name: gloves of the gadgeteer
items.desc: Gadgeteer:   Your evocable items recharge 30% faster and wands have a 30% chance to not spend a charge.

items.name: justicar's regalia
items.desc: Inspire:   When you summon or create an ally, it gains Regeneration.

items.name: skull of Zonguldrok
items.desc: Reaping:   When you kill an enemy with your weapon, its spirit may be forced to fight for you.

items.name: fungal fisticloak
items.desc: Shroompunch:   The cloak sometimes lashes out at its wearer's enemies, inflicting confusion with its spores.

items.name: crown of vainglory
items.desc: Majesty:   You are bathed in light that prevents you from turning invisible. Whenever you enter a new floor, you announce yourself to nearby enemies and refuse to leave the floor again for some time.

items.name: swamp witch's dragon scales
items.desc: TrickPois: Whenever you inflict a negative status on an enemy, you also fully poison it. Those with rPois+ will only be lightly poisoned, and those with rPois∞ won't be poisoned at all.
